## Testing

- [ ] Unit tests pass (`make test`)
- [ ] Dry-run validated (`make run`)
- [ ] Tested against a live cluster (if applicable)
- [ ] AI analysis tested with Bedrock (if applicable)

## Safety Checklist

- [ ] Experiments have rollback mechanisms
- [ ] Duration limits are set
- [ ] dry_run mode works correctly
- [ ] No secrets or credentials in code
- [ ] RBAC permissions are minimal
